creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
(In reply to martin.dieringer from comment #6)
> I used your workaround and emacs24 seems to run fine. It compiled image.el
> when installing I guess

I narrowed it down to the LTO option. The bug with image.el is either caused by the LTO option alone or when used in combination with:

GIF
GNUTLS
JPEG
M17N
MAGICK
OTF
PNG
SCROLLBARS
SOURCES
SVG
TIFF
X11
XFT
XIM
XML
XPM

and

GTK2
